author: tmiychao
content: Please share your weekly updates for upcoming week in this thread! Make sure to add a short / one sentence description about focus of the update so others have context when browsing the thread. And take your time to check other updates yourself, get inspiration from other follows!

author: tmiychao
content: I am still OOO so slowly going through backlog of your updates. I will be reading them, merging and providing feedback if necessary mostly later this week
